extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series contains at least one sharp upward spike that reaches above 0.8 followed quickly by a drop below 0.3.  
R2: After time step 10 and before time step 30, the series stays mostly in a mid-range band between 0.3 and 0.6 without long low valleys.  
R3: Across the whole series, there is no long (10+ consecutive steps) low plateau below 0.3 immediately following the initial high spike.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series shows a strong downward trend from a high level (around 0.7–0.9) to a pronounced valley below 0.3, without a tall isolated spike above 0.9.  
R2: After this early drop, the series remains relatively low or mid-level (mostly between 0.2 and 0.6) for at least 10–15 time steps, forming an extended low/mid plateau.  
R3: Any later tall peak (above about 0.7) occurs only once and is followed by another substantial drop below 0.3 before the end of the series.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of time, the series has a sharp positive spike above 0.8 followed by a rapid drop toward about 0.2.  
R2: In the middle region (about 20–45% of time), the series stays mostly between 0.3 and 0.6 without any long, deep valley below 0.2.  
R3: In the last 40% of time, the series shows several moderate oscillations between roughly 0.2 and 0.7, without any single long downward plunge from above 0.7 to near 0.0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of time, the series starts high (around or above 0.7–0.8) and then drops steeply and more or less monotonically to below about 0.3.  
R2: In the middle region (about 20–45% of time), the series remains in a mid-level band around 0.4–0.6, with only gentle fluctuations.  
R3: In the later middle to early final region (about 40–60% of time), the series exhibits a pronounced deep plunge from above 0.6 down to close to 0.0 before recovering.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series shows at least one sharp upward spike to a high value (around 0.8–1.0) followed by a fast drop.
R2: In the middle region (roughly indices 20–45), the values stay in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) with only gentle up–down undulations, without very deep lows.
R3: In the last third (after index ~45), the series alternates between moderate peaks and troughs but rarely stays near the minimum for many consecutive points.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series starts high and then drops quickly to a clear low valley (around 0.1–0.25) before recovering.
R2: Between indices ~20–45, the series mostly remains in the mid-range (about 0.3–0.6) without returning to the early extreme low.
R3: After index ~45, the series again shows one or more distinct low dips (near 0.1–0.25) followed by a rise to moderate values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate value (around the middle of the range) and shows an early peak in the first 5–10 time steps, not preceded by a very steep rise from near-zero.
R2: Around the middle of the series (roughly one-third to halfway), the values stay in a mid-range plateau (about 0.4–0.6) with only mild fluctuations.
R3: After a pronounced dip later in the series, the values recover to mid-range and remain relatively stable (no long, sharp downward trend near the end).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a high peak very early (within the first 5–10 time steps), rising steeply from lower values to near the upper end of the range.
R2: In the middle portion of the series, after the early peak, the values remain mostly in a moderate band but with a visible overall downward tendency toward lower values.
R3: In the later part of the series, there is a strong, sustained drop from mid-range toward lower values (often forming the lowest valley near the final third), followed by only a partial recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a strong *upward spike* from around 0.4–0.6 up to above 0.8, followed by a quick drop back below about 0.3.  
R2: After this initial spike, the series stays mostly in the mid-range (roughly 0.3–0.6) with several moderate peaks and dips, but without another long, smooth decline.  
R3: There is no long monotonic downward trend from near the maximum value to near the minimum that spans a large portion (e.g., >20%) of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: At the beginning, the series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and then exhibits a *long, mostly downward slope* over the next 10–20% of the time, falling close to its minimum (around 0.1–0.2).  
R2: After this initial long decline, the series rises gradually into the mid-range (0.4–0.6) and stays relatively smooth, without sharp, isolated spikes like in Class 0.  
R3: The global maximum is located near the very start or in the first quarter of the series, and from that point the average trend over the next segment is clearly downward.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a sharp spike or local maximum above ~0.8 followed by a fast drop toward ~0.2 or lower.  
R2: After this early spike-and-drop, the mid part (roughly 20–60% of the series) oscillates around the mid-range (≈0.35–0.6) without any long, monotonic trend.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, the values stay in a moderate band (≈0.3–0.6) without a large, sustained rise or fall.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (≈0.7–0.8) and then shows a long, mostly monotonic decrease down to around 0.1–0.2 within the first 15–25% of the time.  
R2: The mid part (≈25–60% of the series) contains one broad rise from low values (~0.2) up to higher values (~0.6–0.75), forming a large “valley then hill” pattern.  
R3: In the last 20–30% of the series, values remain in the medium range (~0.4–0.6) with relatively small fluctuations and no return to very low values near 0.1.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a strong upward spike that reaches close to the global maximum, followed by a sharp drop.  
R2: In the middle portion (about 20–40% of the series), the values are relatively moderate (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) and fluctuate without any very deep valleys.  
R3: In the last third, there may be one or two spikes, but the values tend to remain above a low baseline (rarely going near 0).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–20% of the series, the signal starts high and then drops sharply toward a local minimum near the lower end of the value range.  
R2: After this drop, the middle portion (about 20–40% of the series) stays in a mid-range band (around 0.4–0.6) with relatively smoother fluctuations.  
R3: In the last third, there is another pronounced downward excursion where the signal briefly approaches its minimum value before recovering.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the value does not stay high; after an initial fluctuation, it quickly drops below about 0.4 and does not maintain a long monotonic decrease from a high plateau.
R2: In the middle segment (roughly time 15–45), the series contains a broad hump where values mostly fluctuate between about 0.35 and 0.6, without a deep, sustained valley below about 0.25.
R3: In the last third (roughly time 45–70), the series tends to end around a medium level (about 0.35–0.6) after 1–2 sharp spikes, rather than rising from a pronounced low.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series starts high (around ≥0.6–0.7) and shows a clear, mostly monotonic drop to a low region (around ≤0.25).
R2: In the middle segment (roughly time 15–45), the series remains relatively low to medium (mostly 0.2–0.5) and does not form a broad, long hump at high values.
R3: In the last third (roughly time 45–70), the series rises from a low region (≈0.1–0.2) up to medium values (≈0.4–0.55) and then oscillates mildly around that medium level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10 time steps), there is a sharp upward spike that reaches a high value (around 0.8–1.0) and then quickly drops.  
R2: After this early spike, the signal oscillates around a middle level (roughly 0.4–0.6) with moderate ups and downs, without staying very low for long.  
R3: No long, steep drop from a mid/high level down to near 0 followed by a slow recovery is present in the second half of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high and then shows an early long, steep decline from a high value (around 0.7–0.9) down toward a low value (around 0.1–0.3) within the first ~15–20 time steps.  
R2: In the middle portion, the signal stays mostly in low-to-mid values (about 0.3–0.6) with relatively small fluctuations.  
R3: In the second half, there is a prominent, sharp drop from mid/high values down close to 0, followed by a gradual rise or stabilization back to mid values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is at least one sharp upward peak above 0.8 followed quickly by a fall below 0.3.  
R2: After this early peak–drop, the values stay mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) with several small oscillations.  
R3: There is no long, monotonic decrease from the start; the series begins already around a mid value (~0.4–0.6) rather than very high and smoothly falling.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very high (around or above 0.7) and then shows a long, mostly monotonic decrease during the first 10–20% of its length, reaching near its minimum (≈0.1–0.2) before rising again.  
R2: After this initial long drop and rebound, the middle part of the series lies mainly in a mid-range band (~0.3–0.6) with moderate oscillations.  
R3: There is no sharp early spike followed immediately by a deep dip within just a few points; instead, the early descent is smoother and extended.
